config.title: INTRASTAT podział stron do druku #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
dim g_zal:g_zal = 0 dim g_str:g_str = 0
function print_page_n(hli) page_.result = 0 g_zal = hli.prop(1) g_str = hli.prop(2) page_.goback end function
function set_range(byval strony) dim pozycja dim iter, itern dim pTab dim pHli set pTab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE_RESULT)).section_body.removeall
for iter = 1 to (((clng(strony)-1)\4)+1) set pHli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='print_page_n' vn1='1' vn2='" + CStr(iter) + "'") pTab.newrow pTab.newcell.addtexthli "Wydruk formularza - załącznik " + CStr(iter) , pHli pTab.cell.align = 1 pTab.element.tip = "Kliknij aby wydrukować załącznik" next
set_range = true end function
function get_range() get_range = page_.domodalauto() end function
function get_range_zal() get_range_zal = clng(g_zal) end function
function get_range_str() get_range_str = clng(g_str) end function
function get_range_clear() g_zal = 0 g_str = 0 end function
